seasonTagline: You glow in the rich, earthy warmth of a golden forest — think burnished copper, mossy greens, and spicy terracottas.
skinDescription: Your skin has a beautiful golden-peachy undertone with a warm, healthy glow and subtle sun-kissed freckles.
hairDescription: Your hair is a rich, warm medium brown that likely reveals golden or bronze glints when it catches the light.
eyeDescription: Your eyes are a warm, amber-brown that perfectly harmonizes with your overall earthy and golden coloring.
seasonStory: As a True Autumn, your coloring is defined by its profound warmth and natural richness. You look most radiant in the saturated, earthy colors of peak fall, which mirror the golden-olive tones in your skin and the warmth in your eyes.

bestColors.name: Terracotta
bestColors.reason: Enhances the warm, earthy glow of your skin

bestColors.name: Rust
bestColors.reason: Adds vibrant warmth that matches your hair's depth

bestColors.name: Mustard Yellow
bestColors.reason: Brings out the golden flecks in your amber eyes

bestColors.name: Warm Teal
bestColors.reason: A sophisticated cool-leaning warm shade for contrast

bestColors.name: Camel
bestColors.reason: An ideal warm neutral that doesn't wash you out

bestColors.name: Pumpkin
bestColors.reason: A signature Autumn shade that brightens your complexion

bestColors.name: Moss Green
bestColors.reason: Harmonizes with your natural, earthy coloring

bestColors.name: Burnt Orange
bestColors.reason: Vivid yet grounded, this brings vitality to your look

bestColors.name: Coffee Brown
bestColors.reason: A rich depth that grounds your more colorful outfits

bestColors.name: Forest Green
bestColors.reason: Provides elegant depth while maintaining warmth

bestColors.name: Marigold
bestColors.reason: A sunny, warm yellow that highlights your skin's clarity

avoidColors.name: Hot Pink
avoidColors.reason: Too cool and neon; it will clash with your warm skin

avoidColors.name: Icy Blue
avoidColors.reason: The cold, pale undertone will make your skin look sallow

avoidColors.name: Pure Black
avoidColors.reason: Too stark and heavy for your beautifully muted coloring

foundation.tip: Always look for foundations with a golden or yellow base to blend seamlessly with your skin's natural warmth.

celebrities.name: Debra Messing
celebrities.reason: She epitomizes the rich warmth and earthy depth of the True Autumn palette.

celebrities.name: Isla Fisher
celebrities.reason: Her skin's golden-olive quality and warm brown eyes mirror your own natural harmony.

celebrities.name: Julianne Moore
celebrities.reason: A classic example of how warm, saturated Autumn tones illuminate this coloring.

celebrities.name: Mariska Hargitay
celebrities.reason: Shares your medium-depth warmth and ability to pull off rich, earthy greens and browns.
